executives.name: Matthew Salthouse
executives.background: Mr. Salthouse is an experienced mining executive with over 25 years of experience in the resources sector. He has held senior roles in corporate finance, commercial, and business development with several ASX-listed companies, including roles at Gindalbie Metals and Karara Mining.

executives.name: Henko Vos
executives.background: Mr. Vos is a member of the Governance Institute of Australia and the South African Institute of Chartered Accountants. He has more than 20 years of experience in public practice and management within the mining and resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Matthew Salthouse
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Salthouse is an experienced mining executive with over 25 years of experience in the resources sector. He has held senior roles in corporate finance, commercial, and business development with several ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Barnaby Egerton-Warburton
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Egerton-Warburton has over 25 years of experience in investment banking, international investment, and market experience. He has held positions at various investment banks including JP Morgan and BNP Paribas.

board_of_directors.name: Dudley Kingsnorth
board_of_directors.background: Professor Kingsnorth is a metallurgist with over 50 years of experience in the international mining industry. He is a globally recognized expert in the rare earths industry.

sources.source_description: Official Company Website - Board and Management Section
